title: Joining the School Basketball Team Tryouts

all.en: Brandon laced up his new sneakers in the locker room before the tryouts began.
all.zh: 布蘭登在選拔開始前在更衣室繫好他的新球鞋鞋帶。

all.en: He had been practicing his shooting in the park every evening for the past month.
all.zh: 過去一個月來，他每天傍晚都在公園練習投籃。

all.en: Coach Lin blew the whistle and called all the hopeful players onto the court.
all.zh: 林教練吹響哨子，把所有滿懷希望的球員叫到場上。

all.en: More than thirty boys lined up nervously, knowing only twelve spots were available.
all.zh: 超過三十名男孩緊張地排成一列，他們知道只有十二個名額。

all.en: The first drill required them to dribble through cones at full speed.
all.zh: 第一項訓練要求他們全速運球穿越三角錐。

all.en: Brandon performed well, but he stumbled slightly during the final lap of the exercise.
all.zh: 布蘭登表現不錯，但在練習的最後一圈他稍微踉蹌了一下。

all.en: Next, the coach paired them up for a one-on-one defensive challenge.
all.zh: 接著，教練將他們兩人一組進行一對一的防守挑戰。

all.en: His opponent was taller and stronger, but Brandon refused to give up easily.
all.zh: 他的對手比他更高更壯，但布蘭登拒絕輕易放棄。

all.en: He managed to steal the ball twice and even scored a clean jump shot.
all.zh: 他成功搶斷了兩次球，甚至投進了一記乾淨的跳投。

all.en: When the tryouts ended, the coach told him to come back tomorrow for the final round.
all.zh: 當選拔結束時，教練告訴他明天回來參加最後一輪。

all.en: Brandon walked home exhausted but proud, dreaming of wearing the team jersey soon.
all.zh: 布蘭登筋疲力盡卻自豪地走回家，夢想著很快能穿上球隊的球衣。

all.en: That night, Brandon stretched his sore muscles carefully and went to bed earlier than usual.
all.zh: 那天晚上，布蘭登小心地伸展痠痛的肌肉，比平常更早就寢。

all.en: His older brother gave him useful advice about staying calm under heavy pressure.
all.zh: 他的哥哥給了他關於在重壓下保持冷靜的實用建議。

all.en: The next afternoon, only fifteen players remained for the final round of the tryouts.
all.zh: 隔天下午，只有十五名球員留下來參加最後一輪選拔。

all.en: Coach Lin divided them into two teams for a serious full-court practice match.
all.zh: 林教練把他們分成兩隊，進行一場正式的全場練習賽。

all.en: Brandon ran hard, passed accurately, and communicated well with his new teammates.
all.zh: 布蘭登跑得很拼命，傳球精準，並與新隊友溝通良好。

all.en: In the second half, he made a critical assist that led to an easy basket.
all.zh: 在下半場，他做出了一個關鍵助攻，促成了一次輕鬆得分。

all.en: The coach watched silently from the sideline, jotting notes on a small clipboard.
all.zh: 教練在邊線安靜地觀察著，在小寫字板上記筆記。

all.en: When the match ended, the players gathered around Coach Lin with anxious expressions.
all.zh: 比賽結束時，球員們神情緊張地圍著林教練。

all.en: He read out the final twelve names slowly, and Brandon's name was on the list.
all.zh: 他緩慢地念出最後十二人的名單，布蘭登的名字就在上面。

all.en: Brandon called his parents immediately, struggling to speak through his happy tears.
all.zh: 布蘭登立刻打電話給父母，激動到幾乎說不出話來。

all.en: The next afternoon, Brandon attended his first official basketball practice in the team's blue jersey.
all.zh: 隔天下午，布蘭登穿著球隊的藍色球衣，參加了他第一場正式的籃球練習。

all.en: His new teammates welcomed him warmly and introduced themselves with friendly fist bumps.
all.zh: 他的新隊友熱情地歡迎他，並以友善的碰拳互相自我介紹。

all.en: Coach Lin assigned him the role of point guard because of his excellent passing ability.
all.zh: 林教練因為他出色的傳球能力，指派他擔任控球後衛。

all.en: Brandon practiced hard for two hours, learning new plays and improving his defensive footwork.
all.zh: 布蘭登努力練習了兩個小時，學習新戰術並改善他的防守腳步。

all.en: After practice, the team captain invited him to join a casual dinner at a noodle restaurant.
all.zh: 練習結束後，隊長邀請他到一家麵店共進輕鬆的晚餐。

all.en: They shared stories, laughed loudly, and discussed their hopes for the upcoming tournament season.
all.zh: 他們分享故事、開懷大笑，並討論對即將到來的賽季的期望。

all.en: Brandon realized that being part of a team meant much more than just winning games.
all.zh: 布蘭登明白了，身為球隊的一份子遠遠不只是贏球而已。

all.en: During their first official match, he scored ten points and made several beautiful assists.
all.zh: 在他們第一場正式比賽中，他得了十分，並做出多次漂亮的助攻。

all.en: His parents sat in the front row, cheering loudly and waving a handmade banner proudly.
all.zh: 他的父母坐在前排，大聲歡呼並驕傲地揮舞著手作橫幅。

all.en: Brandon left the court that night feeling that all his hard work had truly been worth it.
all.zh: 那天晚上布蘭登走下球場時，覺得自己所有的努力都真正值得了。

all.en: Throughout the season, Brandon improved his skills and gradually became one of the team's leaders.
all.zh: 整個球季中，布蘭登提升了自己的技巧，逐漸成為球隊的領袖之一。

all.en: Coach Lin often praised his calm decision-making during the most stressful moments of close games.
all.zh: 林教練常稱讚他在最激烈、壓力最大的比賽時刻所展現的冷靜決策。

all.en: His teammates voted him assistant captain, recognizing both his talent and his humble attitude.
all.zh: 隊友們投票選他擔任副隊長，肯定他的才能與謙虛的態度。

all.en: Brandon helped organize early morning practice sessions before regular classes began each weekday.
all.zh: 布蘭登幫忙安排平日上課前的清晨訓練。

all.en: He also volunteered to mentor younger students who hoped to join the team next school year.
all.zh: 他還自願指導希望明年加入球隊的低年級學生。

all.en: During the regional championship, Brandon scored the winning basket in the final exciting seconds.
all.zh: 在區域錦標賽中，布蘭登在最後幾秒激動的時刻投進了致勝一球。

all.en: The entire gymnasium erupted into cheers as teammates lifted him high above their happy shoulders.
all.zh: 整個體育館爆出歡呼，隊友們把他高高舉到他們歡欣的肩膀上。

all.en: His parents framed the championship photograph and hung it proudly above the living room fireplace.
all.zh: 他的父母把冠軍照片裱框起來，自豪地掛在客廳壁爐上方。

all.en: A famous sports scholarship recruiter contacted Brandon and invited him to a summer training camp.
all.zh: 一位著名的體育獎學金招募人員聯絡布蘭登，邀請他參加暑期訓練營。

all.en: Brandon humbly thanked his family and teammates, knowing none of this had happened by accident.
all.zh: 布蘭登謙虛地感謝家人和隊友，他明白這一切都不是偶然發生的。

all.en: At the summer training camp, Brandon trained with talented players from across the entire country.
all.zh: 在暑期訓練營，布蘭登與來自全國各地的優秀球員一起訓練。

all.en: The coaches focused on advanced ball-handling skills, footwork drills, and game-time decision making.
all.zh: 教練們著重於進階的控球技巧、腳步訓練和臨場決策能力。

all.en: He shared a dormitory room with three other guards who later became his closest lifelong friends.
all.zh: 他和另外三位後衛同住一間宿舍，後來成為了他最親密的終生好友。

all.en: During scrimmages, Brandon impressed scouts with his quick passes and calm leadership under pressure.
all.zh: 在練習賽中，布蘭登以快速的傳球和壓力下冷靜的領導力打動了球探。

all.en: One famous college coach personally invited him to visit the campus during the next holiday break.
all.zh: 一位著名的大學教練親自邀請他在下次假期期間參觀校園。

all.en: Brandon returned home with new techniques, sharper instincts, and unforgettable memories from the camp.
all.zh: 布蘭登帶著新技巧、更敏銳的直覺和訓練營難忘的回憶回到家鄉。

all.en: He immediately shared everything he had learned with his teammates during their first autumn practice.
all.zh: 他在第一次秋季練習中，立刻把所學的一切分享給隊友們。

all.en: Coach Lin praised his humility and his eagerness to help everyone improve together as one team.
all.zh: 林教練讚揚他的謙遜，以及他渴望幫助大家一起進步成為一個團隊的熱忱。

all.en: During the championship game that year, Brandon led his school to a thrilling overtime victory.
all.zh: 在那年的冠軍賽中，布蘭登帶領學校在加時賽中取得驚險勝利。

all.en: He raised the trophy and dedicated their win to every coach, parent, and friend who supported him.
all.zh: 他高舉獎盃，把這場勝利獻給每一位支持他的教練、家長和朋友。

all.en: After winning the championship, Brandon began volunteering at a youth basketball camp every Saturday morning.
all.zh: 贏得冠軍後，布蘭登每個週六早上開始到青年籃球營擔任志工。

all.en: He taught the youngest players how to dribble with confidence and how to celebrate every small improvement.
all.zh: 他教最年幼的球員如何充滿自信地運球，並學會慶祝每個小小的進步。

all.en: Coach Lin invited him to co-lead a summer training program for newly recruited high school athletes.
all.zh: 林教練邀請他共同帶領一個為新進高中運動員設計的暑期訓練計畫。

all.en: Brandon designed exercises focused on team spirit, not just on physical strength or shooting accuracy.
all.zh: 布蘭登設計的練習聚焦於團隊精神，而不只是體能或投籃準度。

all.en: The summer program attracted seventy young athletes from ten different schools across the wider region.
all.zh: 暑期計畫吸引了大區域內十所學校共七十名青年運動員前來參加。

all.en: Brandon's old teammates returned during the program to share their own real game day experiences.
all.zh: 布蘭登的老隊友們也在計畫期間回來分享他們真實的比賽日經驗。

all.en: A local university scout watched one session and offered Brandon a scholarship to study sports management.
all.zh: 一位當地大學的球探觀看了一場訓練後，提供布蘭登一份運動管理學系的獎學金。

all.en: Brandon accepted gratefully, promising to return every summer to keep the youth camp running for years.
all.zh: 布蘭登感激地接受了，承諾每年夏天都會回來，讓青年籃球營持續多年運作下去。

all.en: Coach Lin hugged him tightly, calling him the proudest player he had ever coached in his long career.
all.zh: 林教練緊緊抱住他，稱他是教練生涯中最讓他驕傲的球員。

all.en: Brandon walked off the practice court that evening, knowing his tryouts had launched a journey beyond basketball itself.
all.zh: 那天傍晚走出練習場時，布蘭登明白當年的選拔賽已開啟了一段超越籃球本身的旅程。

all.en: On his first day at the university, Brandon explored the campus and met his new academic advisor.
all.zh: 大學報到第一天，布蘭登在校園裡四處走走，並見到了他的新指導教授。

all.en: His professor encouraged him to combine sports management studies with classes in community leadership.
all.zh: 教授鼓勵他將運動管理學與社區領導力相關課程結合起來。

all.en: Brandon joined the university basketball team and immediately earned the trust of senior teammates.
all.zh: 布蘭登加入大學籃球校隊，立刻贏得了學長隊友們的信任。

all.en: He balanced morning practices, afternoon lectures, and weekend volunteer work with remarkable discipline.
all.zh: 他以驚人的自律平衡晨練、下午的課程，以及週末的志工活動。

all.en: His teammates often joked that he had more energy than three players combined every single day.
all.zh: 他的隊友常開玩笑說，他每天的精力比三位球員加起來還要多。

all.en: During winter break, Brandon visited his old high school and watched Coach Lin train younger students.
all.zh: 寒假期間，布蘭登回到母校高中，看著林教練訓練年輕的學弟們。

all.en: He gave a heartfelt speech about discipline, friendship, and the value of believing in your own potential.
all.zh: 他發表了一篇真摯的演講，談到紀律、友誼以及相信自己潛力的價值。

all.en: Several middle school students later wrote letters saying his words had inspired them to keep playing.
all.zh: 後來有幾位中學生寫信表示，他的話語激勵了他們持續打球。

all.en: Brandon kept every letter in a special folder beside his desk to remind him why he played.
all.zh: 布蘭登把每一封信都收在書桌旁的特別資料夾裡，提醒自己當初為何打球。

all.en: Years later, he would say those letters mattered more to him than any championship trophy ever did.
all.zh: 多年後他會說，那些信對他的意義比任何冠軍獎盃都更為深遠。

all.en: During his second university year, Brandon was elected captain of the college basketball team unanimously.
all.zh: 大學二年級時，布蘭登一致通過被選為大學籃球校隊的隊長。

all.en: He created weekly study circles where players supported each other through difficult exams and tough schedules.
all.zh: 他設立了每週讀書會，讓球員們在艱難的考試和緊湊的行程中互相支持。

all.en: Their coach praised Brandon for raising the team's grade point average to the highest in school history.
all.zh: 他們的教練讚揚布蘭登把球隊的平均成績拉到校史上的最高紀錄。

all.en: A national sports magazine featured him in a long article about leadership both on and off the court.
all.zh: 一本全國運動雜誌在長篇報導中介紹他，內容涵蓋場上場下的領導力。

all.en: Brandon used part of his scholarship stipend to buy new basketballs for his old high school team.
all.zh: 布蘭登用部分獎學金津貼為母校高中籃球隊購買了全新的籃球。

all.en: Coach Lin sent a video of the team unwrapping the gift, with younger players cheering loudly and gratefully.
all.zh: 林教練寄來球隊拆禮物的影片，年輕球員們大聲且感激地歡呼。

all.en: Brandon watched the video twice and felt a quiet warmth that no trophy had ever managed to provide.
all.zh: 布蘭登把影片看了兩次，感受到一份任何獎盃都無法帶來的靜謐溫暖。

all.en: He decided to write a short book about teamwork, dedicating the entire profits to youth sports programs.
all.zh: 他決定撰寫一本關於團隊合作的小書，將所有收益捐給青少年運動計畫。

all.en: The book launched at a small ceremony attended by his parents, his old teammates, and Coach Lin.
all.zh: 這本書在一場小型發表會上推出，他的父母、老隊友和林教練都出席了。

all.en: Brandon signed the very first copy and gave it to Coach Lin with tears of deep, lifelong gratitude.
all.zh: 布蘭登在第一本書上簽名，含著終生感激的淚水，把它送給了林教練。

all.en: The day after the book launch, Brandon woke up to find dozens of messages from former teammates flooding his phone.
all.zh: 新書發表的隔天，布蘭登一覺醒來，手機被前隊友的訊息塞爆。

all.en: One old teammate sent a photo of the team's first championship trophy, still sitting on his apartment shelf years later.
all.zh: 一位老隊友傳來他們首座冠軍獎盃的照片，多年後仍擺在他公寓的層架上。

all.en: Brandon noticed his sneakers had finally worn through the soles and quietly added a new pair to his shopping list.
all.zh: 布蘭登發現他的球鞋鞋底終於磨穿了，默默地把新球鞋加進購物清單。

all.en: Coach Lin invited him over for a home-cooked dumpling dinner, refusing to let him pay for a single ingredient.
all.zh: 林教練邀請他到家裡吃手工水餃晚餐，不准他出任何一樣食材的錢。

all.en: Brandon brought a small thank-you gift, a framed copy of his book's dedication page written to Coach Lin.
all.zh: 布蘭登帶了一份小禮物，是他書中那頁獻給林教練的獻詞裱框。

all.en: During dinner, Coach Lin's wife shared funny stories of how Coach Lin had practiced his pep talks in front of the bathroom mirror for years.
all.zh: 晚餐時，林教練的太太分享了趣事，說他多年來都在浴室鏡子前練習賽前打氣的演講。

all.en: Brandon laughed until his stomach hurt and made a mental note to add the story into his next book.
all.zh: 布蘭登笑到肚子發疼，默默記下這個故事要寫進下一本書。

all.en: On his way home, he stopped by his old high school gym and walked one final lap around the silent court.
all.zh: 回家路上，他繞去母校的體育館，繞著安靜的球場走了最後一圈。

all.en: Brandon left a small handwritten note on the locker room bench, simply reading you belong here too, signed with his initials.
all.zh: 布蘭登在更衣室長椅上留了一張手寫小紙條，上頭只寫著「你也屬於這裡」，落款是他姓名的縮寫。

all.en: Years later, a nervous tryout student would find that note tucked behind the bench and quietly slip it into his own pocket for courage.
all.zh: 多年後，一位緊張的選拔新生會在長椅後找到那張紙條，悄悄塞進口袋裡，當作勇氣的來源。
